tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: Climate change poses a threat of 1.1. _________ (1.1) proportions to ecosystems around the globe. International 1.2. _________ (1.2) on emission targets have proved extremely difficult, with nations often failing to reach agreement. The environmental 1.3. _________ (1.3) caused by decades of pollution may be 1.4. _________ (1.4) in some regions, leaving permanent scars on the landscape. Many governments have been criticised for their 1.5. _________ (1.5) in addressing the crisis, as the measures taken remain 1.6. _________ (1.6) to the scale of the problem. There is growing 1.7. _________ (1.7) among scientists that only a dramatic shift towards 1.8. _________ (1.8) energy sources can prevent the worst outcomes.
